source_title: ArthroFLEX BioWasher for SpeedBridge Knotless RCR
text: ArthroFlex® BioWasher™ for use with SpeedBridge™ Knotless Rotator Cuff Repairs Surgical Technique ArthroFlex BioWasher Knotless SwiveLock Anchors with FiberTape Provide the Strongest and Lowest SwiveLock with FiberTape Loop The 4.75 mm BioComposite Vented SwiveLock is now available with a preloaded FiberTape loop that allows easy FiberTape passage for the medial row of a a Scorpion Suture Passer, eliminating Single Knotless Anchor Pull-Out Strength Strength Data on /f_i le - straight axial pull-out in laminated foam block (10 pcf cancellous core with a 2 mm thick 20 pcf cortical shell) The science behind the technology... 80 70 60 50 40 30 20 10 0 5.5 mm Bio-SwiveLock C w/FiberTape 71.2 4.75 mm Bio-SwiveLock C w/FiberTape 56.9 Load-to-Failure (lbf) Mitek Versalok® 34.1 Mitek Healix Knotless™ 31.7 Arthrocare Opus Magnum® 27.5 Cayenne Quattro® Link 20.0 Arthrocare SpeedScrew® 30.6 Smith&Nephew Footprint PK™Footprint PK™Footprint PK 19.3 4.5 mm Linvatec PopLok® 14.4  Self-punching design eliminates the need  Facilitates repair visualization prior to insertion  Facilitates repair visualization prior to insertion The fully threaded SwiveLock C can be combined with FiberTape to create a quick and secure SpeedBridge construct with no knots. The result is a low profile, transosseous equivalent “suturebridge” that enhances the footprint compression to maximize contact between tendon and bone. The addition of the ArthroFlex BioWasher adds a biologic component to augment the tendon/suture interface. 1 2 Preload a FiberTape into the eyelet of a BioComposite SwiveLock C for use as a medial row anchor.
